chunks.title: Biography
chunks.content: TAMU class of '75. Academic degrees: BA Pol Sci; MA English Lit & Writing Pedagogies; MS National Security Strategy. Veteran who served 27 years in the Army.

chunks.title: Catalog Description
chunks.content: Professional Development. (0-0). Credit 0. Participation in an approved high-impact learning practice; reflection on professional outcomes from engineering body of knowledge; documentation and self-assessment of learning experience at mid-curriculum point. Prerequisites: Grade of C or better in ISEN 210 and ISEN 230; senior classification.

chunks.title: Course Prerequisites
chunks.content: Prerequisite/Corequisite(s): Grade of C or better in ISEN 210 and ISEN 230; senior classification.
